title: Sky's Overworld Netherite
description: A simple mod that adds a new method for obtaining Netherite in the overworld! 🪨
body:
# What is Sky's Overworld Netherite? 💭
▪ This mod adds Ancient Debris ore to the Overworld! It's rare and drops Ancient Shards when mined. You can either get a normal shard or, with a 10% chance, a large shard. You'll need 9 normal shards or 4 large shards to craft one Ancient Debris. However, you can increase your chances of getting large shards with Fortune!

# New Items & Blocks 🪨
### - Ancient Debris ore & Deepslate Ancient Debris ore
▪ These two new ores spawn from Y level 32 down to Y level -59 and drop **Ancient Debris Shards** when mined. The chance of obtaining a large shard increases with the Fortune enchantment.

### - Ancient Debris Shard (Small and Large) 
▪ These shards drop from **Ancient Debris Ore** and are used to craft Ancient Debris. You'll need 9 Small Shards or 4 Large Shards to craft one Ancient Debris. You can also craft 2 Small Shards from one Large Shard.

# Compatibility ⚙️
▪ This mod is compatible with both **Forge and NeoForge**, and updates are usually released simultaneously on both loaders.

▪ This mod also supports the **Create mod** and adds two Crushing Wheel recipes!

# Usage 🧪

### ▪ YOU MAY use this in your modpack on CurseForge / Modrinth with or without credit.

### ▪ YOU MAY use this mod in your video with credit!

### ▪ YOU MAY NOT redistribute this mod on other websites.
